name: Multi-Timeframe Analysis Workflow
description: Workflow for conducting multi-timeframe analysis (HTF/MTF/LTF alignment) and generating trade recommendations based on confluence of signals across timeframes.

config.prompt: Analyze the higher timeframe (weekly/monthly) for the given instrument. Identify: major trend direction, key support/resistance levels, major chart patterns, and macro outlook. Return JSON with: timeframe (string), trend (bullish/bearish/neutral), keyLevels (array), patterns (array), outlook (string), bias (string).

Analyze the middle timeframe (4-hour/daily) for alignment with higher timeframe. Identify: current market structure, order blocks, liquidity zones, and intermediate trend. Return JSON with: timeframe (string), trend (bullish/bearish/neutral), structure (object), orderBlocks (array), liquidityPools (array), alignment (boolean), bias (string).

Analyze the lower timeframe (1-hour/15-min) for entry opportunities. Identify: exact entry zones, stop loss placement, precise take profit targets, and entry triggers. Return JSON with: timeframe (string), entryZones (array), stopLoss (string), takeProfit (string), triggers (array), setupQuality (high/medium/low).

Synthesize analysis from all timeframes to generate trade recommendation. Check for confluence: HTF/MTF/LTF alignment, multiple support/resistance hits, indicator confirmation. Return JSON with: recommendation (buy/sell/no-trade), confidence (0-100), confluenceFactors (array), riskLevel (low/medium/high), entry (string), stop (string), target (string), rationale (string).
